objective: Determine whether Candidate B remains a distinct bounded middle candidate after repairing its known paper gaps.
scope_and_artifacts: Write exact paper judgments for public Sparse admission and H-STORE relation; backing-root provenance across block-owner-token relocation; recursive and traversal exact cleanup; and a delta showing whether any rule is A-general or C-family-specific.
prerequisites: Owner accepts the gap audit as a valid research input; no implementation prerequisite.
pass_condition: All three gaps have finite deterministic rules, no arbitrary predicate or proof rule, no named-family operation, no weaker-shape tax, and a mechanical rule-count/interaction inventory.
fail_condition: Any gap remains prose-only; requires user-defined predicates/axioms, container recognition, universal metadata, or a new family-specific operation; or the rule inventory is unbounded.
explicit_exclusions: No syntax/spec change, parser/checker/compiler code, candidate, model execution, witness source, held-out source/trace, benchmark, or production change.
owner_options: Authorize none; authorize VR-0 only; request a revised paper scope.

objective: Test memory, owner, provenance, cleanup, interference, and fact soundness of the repaired bounded kernel before structural or performance work.
scope_and_artifacts: Construct a deterministic abstract state model for B-1 through B-10 plus C0-4/C0-6; positive traces for Prefix/Hole/Sparse/Product, place transitions, owner-returning failure, W-ARENA root transfer, W-RECUR cleanup, and W-PIPE abandonment; hostile mutations for uninitialized read, duplicate/lost owner, wrong root, stale version, duplicate/missed drop, and forged fact.
prerequisites: VR-0 PASS and independent hostile review of its exact judgments.
pass_condition: Zero safety violations in exhaustive bounded exploration and independent generative differential checking; every hostile mutation is rejected for the intended first reason; model and oracle agree on all accepted traces.
fail_condition: One accepted invalid read, owner duplication/loss, wrong-root borrow, stale authority, race/interference violation, cleanup error, or forged fact; indeterminate resolves to failure.
explicit_exclusions: No compiler/runtime implementation, optimized lowering, allocation prototype, throughput/code-size measurement, AI trial, external/target event, witness/held-out execution, or production change.
owner_options: Authorize none; authorize VR-1 only after VR-0 PASS; require a narrower model.

objective: Test whether the repaired bounded kernel preserves exact no-tax and witness event budgets without interpreting timing.
scope_and_artifacts: Construct non-production structural artifacts for B-FIX, B-P2, W-GAP, H-STORE, W-ARENA, W-RECUR, and W-PIPE; record layouts, metadata, owner events, allocations, bytes, moves, checks, calls, indirect edges, cleanup visits, fact producers/invalidators, and reachable code growth.
prerequisites: VR-1 hostile-reviewed PASS; frozen source/contracts and counters; no candidate performance results visible during structural adjudication.
pass_condition: B-FIX/B-P2 exact identity; W-GAP no tag and exact distance moves; H-STORE O(c+U) with public relation and O(1) updates; W-ARENA zero borrow table/payload relocation; W-RECUR exact bounded-stack cleanup; W-PIPE zero materialization/allocation/indirect call and linear machinery.
fail_condition: Any unexplained initialization, copy, move, allocation, metadata, branch, indirection, call, check, machine event, code-growth excess, privileged helper, or protected-route change.
explicit_exclusions: No wall-clock performance, competitor comparison, AI trial, held-out tuning, production compiler path, external/target event model, or language/specification adoption.
owner_options: Authorize none; authorize VR-2 only after VR-1 PASS; authorize a smaller control-plus-one-witness slice.

objective: Test one exact external-machine boundary independently of storage candidate performance.
scope_and_artifacts: Select one partial read/write plus retained-buffer/resource-close slice; enumerate exact platform rows, buffer footprints, partial progress, blocking/readiness, ownership transfer, close, error, validation, provider identity, and machine events; build a deterministic event-state model and hostile provider/result mutations.
prerequisites: Owner separately chooses one platform/profile and exact operation slice; VR-0 is helpful but VR-2 and performance are not prerequisites.
pass_condition: Every source outcome maps to one exact event sequence and owner/resource state; partial progress and close are exact; foreign data is validated; missing rows reject; hostile mutations fail closed.
fail_condition: Generic syscall/symbol/ABI descriptor, hidden copy/allocation/duplicate event, lost progress/resource, forged provider/result, untracked blocking, or platform ambiguity.
explicit_exclusions: No target SIMD/MMIO/DMA, atomics/memory model, executable image, throughput benchmark, candidate scoring, witness/held-out execution, or production provider.
owner_options: Authorize none; authorize one exact VR-3 slice; choose a different machine boundary.

objective: Measure candidate-attributable runtime and code-shape effects only after safety and structural claims survive.
scope_and_artifacts: Freeze one repaired B prototype and matched A/C controls for W-GAP and H-STORE plus B-FIX/B-P2; measure optimized bodies, retained checks, code size, compile time, allocations/bytes/moves/events, and preregistered throughput against matched safe Rust and hand-fused xlang ceilings.
prerequisites: VR-1 and VR-2 hostile-reviewed PASS; exact contracts, source, targets, compiler revisions, statistical plan, counters, and stop rules frozen before execution.
pass_condition: All safety/structure gates remain exact; protected controls are identical; at least one registered performance barrier is removed with the predicted event delta and confidence rule; no hidden tax or semantic mismatch.
fail_condition: Any safety/structure mismatch; protected regression; unexplained event; candidate-private tuning; no predicted code-shape delta; or preregistered performance rule failure.
explicit_exclusions: No language/specification adoption, production compiler path, broader benchmark suite, post-result tuning, AI trial, external/target event claims, or E0.1 restart.
owner_options: Authorize none; authorize VR-4 only after VR-1/VR-2 PASS; choose one smaller benchmark cell.

objective: Test first-green construction and diagnostic repair separately from safety and performance scoring.
scope_and_artifacts: Freeze lower-tier model, prompts, candidate teaching packets, visible construction tasks, independent repair tasks, token/attempt ceilings, and metrics for success, retries, source size, missing-rule diagnosis, wrong-family/form selection, and hidden-cost mistakes across A/B/C.
prerequisites: Exact paper rules for all compared candidates; safety model may inform negative tasks, but no performance result is shown to the model or adjudicator.
pass_condition: Predeclared correctness and repair thresholds pass; no unsafe request, privileged helper, hidden copy/allocation, or repeated nonlocal diagnostic loop; results are reproducible under the frozen protocol.
fail_condition: Threshold failure, candidate-specific prompt tuning after results, leakage of held-out source/trace, unsafe workaround, persistent wrong form/family, or unverifiable output.
explicit_exclusions: No candidate performance measurement, language/spec adoption, production teaching, compiler implementation, held-out execution, or model fine-tuning.
owner_options: Authorize none; authorize VR-5 independently after paper rules freeze; request a narrower AI task.
